name: S2Point
javadoc:
/** * This class represents a point on the 2-sphere. *

* We use the mathematical convention to use the azimuthal angle \( \theta \) * in the x-y plane as the first coordinate, and the polar angle \( \varphi \) * as the second coordinate (see Spherical * Coordinates in MathWorld). *

*

Instances of this class are guaranteed to be immutable.

* @since 3.3 */

members.name: S2Point
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Simple constructor.
 * Build a vector from its spherical coordinates
 * @param theta azimuthal angle \( \theta \) in the x-y plane
 * @param phi polar angle \( \varphi \)
 * @see #getTheta()
 * @see #getPhi()
 * @exception OutOfRangeException if \( \varphi \) is not in the [\( 0; \pi \)] range
 */

tags.name: theta
tags.content: azimuthal angle \( \theta \) in the x-y plane
tags.description: azimuthal angle \( \theta \) in the x-y plane

tags.name: OutOfRangeException
tags.content: if \( \varphi \) is not in the [\( 0; \pi \)] range
tags.description: if \( \varphi \) is not in the [\( 0; \pi \)] range

/**
 * Compute the distance (angular separation) between two points.
 * @param p1 first vector
 * @param p2 second vector
 * @return the angular separation between p1 and p2
 */

tags.content: angular separation between p1 and p2

members.name: equals
members.javadoc:
/** * Test for the equality of two points on the 2-sphere. *

* If all coordinates of two points are exactly the same, and none are * Double.NaN, the two points are considered to be equal. *

*

* NaN coordinates are considered to affect globally the vector * and be equals to each other - i.e, if either (or all) coordinates of the * 2D vector are equal to Double.NaN, the 2D vector is equal to * {@link #NaN}. *

* * @param other Object to test for equality to this * @return true if two points on the 2-sphere objects are equal, false if * object is null, not an instance of S2Point, or * not equal to this S2Point instance */

tags.name: other
tags.content: Object to test for equality to this
tags.description: Object to test for equality to this

tags.content: if two points on the 2-sphere objects are equal, false if object is null, not an instance of S2Point, or not equal to this S2Point instance
tags.assertion: assert methodResultID == (args[0] != null && args[0].getClass() == receiverObjectID.getClass() && !receiverObjectID.isNaN() && receiverObjectID.getTheta() == ((S2Point)args[0]).getTheta() && receiverObjectID.getPhi() == ((S2Point)args[0]).getPhi());
tags.description: true if two points on the 2-sphere objects are equal, false if object is null, not an instance of S2Point, or not equal to this S2Point instance

members.name: hashCode
members.javadoc:
/** * Get a hashCode for the 2D vector. *

* All NaN values have the same hash code.

* * @return a hash code value for this object */
